title: Gizmo Pack
body:
The Official Gizmo0o Texture Pack.

This pack adds custom golden apples, shields, totems, enderpearls and much more. All the custom items are branded to the classic Gizmo0o googly eyes.

If you enjoy Gizmo's content on YouTube (https://youtube.com/Gizmo0o) then this is the perfect pack to use and show support, this texture pack is minimal and verry pleasent to use still making the game look like Minecraft.

If you want to see exactly what this pack changes without having to download it and try it yourself, then you can watch the video showcase on YouTube here: https://youtu.be/Pjz3kwKB468

I hope you enjoy the pack :D
